esp8266_webserver_create.tooltip: Create a Web server object with the specified listening port

esp8266_webserver_begin.tooltip: Start the Web server and begin listening for client connections

esp8266_webserver_handle_client.tooltip: Process client requests, must be called continuously in loop

esp8266_webserver_on.tooltip: Register a route handler that executes when the specified path is requested

esp8266_webserver_serve_static.message0: %1 Serve static files URL path %2 filesystem %3 directory %4
esp8266_webserver_serve_static.tooltip: Map a URL path to a filesystem directory for serving static files

esp8266_webserver_send.tooltip: Send an HTTP response to the client

esp8266_webserver_send_simple.tooltip: Send a 200 OK plain text response

esp8266_webserver_uri.tooltip: Get the URI path of the current request

esp8266_webserver_method.tooltip: Get the HTTP method of the current request (GET, POST, etc.)

esp8266_webserver_arg.tooltip: Get the value of a request parameter (URL query or POST form data)

esp8266_webserver_has_arg.tooltip: Check if a specified parameter exists in the request

esp8266_webserver_args_count.tooltip: Get the number of parameters in the request

esp8266_webserver_arg_by_index.tooltip: Get the value of a request parameter by its index

esp8266_webserver_arg_name.tooltip: Get the name of a request parameter by its index

esp8266_webserver_header.tooltip: Get the value of a specified request header

esp8266_webserver_has_header.tooltip: Check if a specified request header exists

esp8266_webserver_host_header.tooltip: Get the Host header value of the request

esp8266_webserver_path_arg.tooltip: Get a URL path argument (when using {} or regex matching)

esp8266_webserver_request_authentication.tooltip: Request the client to perform authentication

esp8266_webserver_enable_cors.tooltip: Enable or disable CORS cross-origin support

esp8266_webserver_client_ip.tooltip: Get the IP address of the current client
